name: Corn Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1/2 C thawed frozen corn, cut into small pieces
2 tbsp finely chopped red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and baking powder in a large bowl.
2. Add the egg substitute to the bowl and mix well.
3. Stir in the thawed frozen corn and cream-style corn until combined.
4. Fold in the finely chopped red bell pepper.
5. Spray a non-stick skillet with cooking spray.
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the skillet, forming four fritters.
7. Cook over medium heat for 2-3 minutes, or until the bottoms are lightly browned.
8. Flip the fritters and cook an additional 2-3 minutes on the other side.
9. Garnish with red bell pepper rings.
10. Serve warm.
